ddls:
CREATE TABLE "restaurants" (
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restaurant */,
  "restaurant_name" TEXT /* Name of the restaurant */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the restaurant */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the restaurant */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Description of the restaurant's opening hours */,
  "seating_capacity" INTEGER /* Number of seats available in the restaurant */,
  "special_offers" TEXT /* Description of any special offers or promotions */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the restaurant's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the category image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the subcategory belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subcategory */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the subcategory image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ingredients" (
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ingredient */,
  "ingredient_name" TEXT /* Name of the ingredient */,
  "calories" INTEGER /* Calories in the ingredient */,
  "fat" INTEGER /* Fat content in grams */,
  "saturated_fat" INTEGER /* Saturated fat content in grams */,
  "trans_fat" INTEGER /* Trans fat content in grams */,
  "cholesterol" INTEGER /* Cholesterol content in milligrams */,
  "sodium" INTEGER /* Sodium content in milligrams */,
  "carbohydrates" INTEGER /* Carbohydrates content in grams */,
  "fiber" INTEGER /* Fiber content in grams */,
  "sugars" INTEGER /* Sugars content in grams */,
  "protein" INTEGER /* Protein content in grams */,
  "allergens" TEXT /* List of potential allergens in the ingredient */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the ingredient */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the ingredient */,
  "is_organic" INTEGER /* Indicates if the ingredient is organic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ingredient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ingredients_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "menu_ingredients" (
  "menu_ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each menu item-ingredient mapping */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the menu item */,
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ingredient */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the ingredient used in the menu item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("menu_ingredient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menu_ingredients_ingredient_id FOREIGN KEY ("ingredient_id") REFERENCES ingredients ("ingredient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, staff, admin) */,
  "dietary_preferences" TEXT /* User's dietary preferences */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* User's known allergies */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the menu item being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the item */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the item was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "user_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the item */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the item */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the supplier's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ingredient */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Current quantity of the ingredient in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the inventory was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_ingredient_id FOREIGN KEY ("ingredient_id") REFERENCES ingredients ("ingredient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the menu item */,
  "preference_type" TEXT /* Type of preference (e.g., favorite, avoid) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the preference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback_and_reviews" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the menu item */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* User's comment or review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the feedback was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_and_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
